issues.title: Unable to find Spring AI 1.0.0 dependencies
issues.body:
I want to use Spring AI GA version in my enterprise applications. Our organisation runs a privately artefactory instance and we can't directly get the dependencies from public sources.

I've tried searching all possible public repositories and I can't find the path to the 1.0.0 versions except for few of the modules. 

Is it possible to create a table of all the key modules and their compatible versions?

comments.body:
Hi @saranshbansal, The Spring AI BOM contains all the dependencies managed by Spring AI. 

```
<dependencyManagement>
    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-bom</artifactId>
            <version>1.0.0</version>
            <type>pom</type>
            <scope>import</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
</dependencyManagement>
```

All the dependencies specified in Spring AI BOM are available in maven central as well.  Please re-open this issue if you still have problem with downloading any specific dependency.
